hero.title: BOOK FREE
hero.description: Experience your first session completely FREE at Fitnet Fitness - Hanoi. No language limits, no strength limits! Achieve your fitness goals with our professional trainers.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.heading: WE ARE
about.description1: Located at Floor 7, No. 23, Alley 89 Pham Van Dong, Cau Giay, Hanoi, Fitnet Fitness is your premier destination for achieving fitness excellence. We believe in breaking barriers - no language limits, no strength limits!
about.description2: Our multilingual facility welcomes members from all backgrounds, providing world-class equipment, expert trainers, and a supportive community to help you reach your fitness goals.

bmi.title: BMI CALCULATOR
bmi.heading: Calculate Your
bmi.description: Discover your BMI and get personalized health recommendations based on your body metrics
bmi.helper: Enter your height and weight to calculate your BMI

statusDescriptions.underweight: Your BMI indicates you may be underweight. Consider consulting with a nutritionist to develop a healthy weight gain plan.
statusDescriptions.normal: Congratulations! Your BMI is in the healthy range. Maintain your current lifestyle with regular exercise and balanced nutrition.
statusDescriptions.overweight: Your BMI indicates you may be overweight. Consider adopting a healthier diet and increasing physical activity.
statusDescriptions.obese: Your BMI indicates obesity. We recommend consulting with healthcare professionals for a comprehensive health plan.
